About Me

Designing systems that perform & last

I'm a Software Designer with 4+ years of experience in designing and developing scalable systems using .NET technologies. Currently at Alstom, I work on critical applications for real-time rail control systems with a focus on performance, maintainability, and clean architecture.

I specialise in Microservices architecture, RESTful API design, and writing clean, production-ready C# code. I hold an M.Tech from NIT Silchar and a B.Tech from MCE Motihari.

I enjoy solving complex engineering problems and collaborating in agile teams to build systems that are reliable and future-proof.

Open Source

Featured Projects

🛒
EShop Microservices

Cloud-native e-commerce platform built with .NET 8 demonstrating Domain Driven Design, CQRS, and event-driven communication. Features Catalog, Basket, Discount, and Ordering services each with their own database, communicating via RabbitMQ through an API Gateway.

.NET 8C#DDD CQRSRabbitMQDockerPostgreSQL
🔭
OtelDemo — Distributed Tracing

Full .NET 8 demo showcasing distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry, Jaeger, RabbitMQ, and PostgreSQL using Hexagonal (Port-Adapter) Architecture. Demonstrates TraceId/SpanId propagation across services via W3C traceparent headers.

.NET 8OpenTelemetryJaeger RabbitMQDockerHexagonal Arch
💾
Production Backup & Rotation

A practical DevOps project implementing a production-grade backup automation script with rotation management. Built with Bash scripting to automate backup workflows, manage retention policies, and handle disk space efficiently.

BashDevOpsShell Scripting AutomationLinux
